How to choose a chic French cascade
bouquet🤍
A soft white-and-green palette, featuring calla lilies and
orchids, creates those graceful, flowing
French-romantic lines.
True elegance is always built from the smallest, most
delicate details 🦢

A mini cascade bouquet doesn’t feel overly grand —
instead, it highlights a bride’s natural poise and
effortless beauty, full of life and movement

Special thanks to our amazing photographer
@filmbyxiao
Every shoot turns into a masterpiece!

column3:
✨ Florals make it wearable 💍🌿 

So excited to share something special with you all.
We recently partnered with the design label Thirdfloor @third_floor_art , known for their exquisite handcrafted botanical jewelry made from real, natural plants.

The first time I stepped into their studio, honestly didn’t want to leave — every piece felt like a tiny work of art.
Each flower and leaf is one-of-a-kind, preserved and transformed through fine jewelry craftsmanship into truly bespoke designs.

My Favorites:
Dreamlike Illusion — mica + pearls, soft and ethereal, like something a forest fairy would wear
Black Flame — bold, mysterious, and unapologetically unique

Because no two plants are ever the same, every piece is uniquely yours — made for your story, your style, your moment.

Best part?
North America friends can now find them through Sun Florist 🌸
(Ship anywhere in USA)

DM us for details or to reserve your favorite 💌 (Ship anywhere in USA)
